video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 11 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: a first stage finish in remini on the giro d'italia for 60 years a probable opportunity for the sprinters on stage 11 of this 2020 race joao almeida still led the jira going into this stage one of the easier ones on paper but with a couple of technical bits on the approach tori mini at the end should be won after 182 k's for the fast riders after starting in porto santel pedio a five-man breakaway went up the road got as many as four minutes the five men were baiss of androni now in charge of the breakaway prize most kilometers spread at the front of the race for him madzuko and romano were there for bardiani with armey the only man on the world tour and frappurti yet again in the break for vinnie zaboo at the intermediate sprint it would be bardiani who would take the honours francesco romano doing that 23 year old out in front but behind three points are available in the fight for the points jersey and arnold de mar took it just ahead of peter sagan extending his overall lead to 21 points in the malaya chiclamino 35 k's to go by ice and army were the strongest and attacked behind in the chase there was a problem for elia viviani through no fault of his own he ended up on the ground a motorbike trying to move through the peloton in the town of hospitaletto meant the italian former national champion and the continental king from last year had to chase back on chasing away at the front was sander army a winner of a stage at the spaniard three years ago looking for a contract for 2021 and showing a real fight the meantime viviani needed the attention of the doctor not the ideal preparation for a sprint that's exactly what we were going to have heading into the final few kilometers a succession of twists and turns in brimini meant that the peloton would approach at warp speed catching armey with just six kilometers to go at this point it was uae emirates leading israel startup nation gave them a bit of help but frances issue that is would bully them out the way and put arnold into a perfect position already a winner of a stage on three occasions at this judo again he'd hit the front and once more the whole peloton would fail to dislodge him in that order and a fourth stage win for the first time since bernardino for a frenchman at the giro d'italia imperius arnold nobody can touch him in the sprint so far at this g dot he also extended his lead in the points classification demar sagan hodge sonny and zabo gabiria only managing seventh place and fifiani down in 10th after that crash pink jersey remained on the back of joel almeida and will do for a ninth day on the 12th stage 34 seconds his lead unchanged and payout bilbao remains in third place going on the stage 12 a much more difficult one and we remember the late marco pantani starting and finishing in his hometown of cesinatico taking on many of the hills that we see in very famous sportif races such as the novicholi four out of five a difficult day we'll be up there a whole host of different riders could be break gc just about anything you
